🔗 Google Sheets Sync

Every Receive/Issue will be automatically saved to Google Sheets

⚙️ Setup — Google Apps Script URL
Follow the steps below to create the URL, then paste it here.
📤 Manual Sync to Google Sheets

Use the button below to sync all data to Google Sheets at any time.

📖 Google Apps Script Setup Guide (Step by Step)
Step 1 — Create Spreadsheet
1. Open sheets.google.com
2. Create a new Spreadsheet
3. Name it: IGL Store ERP
Step 2 — Open Apps Script
1. In Spreadsheet: Extensions → Apps Script
2. Delete old code and paste the code below
3. Save (Ctrl+S)
Step 3 — Deploy
1. Deploy → New Deployment
2. Type: Web App
3. Execute as: Me
4. Who has access: Anyone
5. Deploy → Copy URL
Step 4 — Enter URL
1. Paste the copied URL in the form above
2. Click the Save URL button
3. Test with Test Connection
4. Enable Auto Sync ✅
📋 Apps Script Code (Copy and paste):
const SHEET_NAME_RECEIVE = 'Receive';
const SHEET_NAME_ISSUE   = 'Issue';
const SHEET_NAME_STOCK   = 'Stock';
const SHEET_NAME_STN     = 'Stationery';
const DRIVE_FILE_NAME    = 'IGL_Store_ERP_Data.json'; // Google Drive এ এই নামে সেভ হবে

// ── Google Drive এ JSON save/update ──
function saveToDrive(raw) {
  try {
    var files = DriveApp.getFilesByName(DRIVE_FILE_NAME);
    if (files.hasNext()) {
      files.next().setContent(raw); // আগের ফাইল update
    } else {
      DriveApp.createFile(DRIVE_FILE_NAME, raw, MimeType.PLAIN_TEXT); // নতুন ফাইল তৈরি
    }
  } catch(e) {
    Logger.log('Drive save error: ' + e);
  }
}

function doPost(e) {
  try {
    const raw = (e.parameter && e.parameter.data) ? e.parameter.data : e.postData.contents;
    const data = JSON.parse(raw);
    const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();

    if (data.action === 'save') {
      // Script Properties এ save
      PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().setProperty('igl_backup', raw);
      // *** Google Drive এ JSON save ***
      saveToDrive(raw);
      return ok('Saved + Drive updated');
    }
    if (data.action === 'monthly_backup') {
      var monthKey = 'igl_backup_' + data.monthKey;
      PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().setProperty(monthKey, raw);
      var fileName = 'IGL_Backup_' + data.monthName + '.json';
      var files = DriveApp.getFilesByName(fileName);
      if (files.hasNext()) {
        files.next().setContent(raw);
      } else {
        DriveApp.createFile(fileName, raw, MimeType.PLAIN_TEXT);
      }
      // Main Drive file ও update করো
      saveToDrive(raw);
      return ok('Monthly backup saved: ' + fileName);
    }
    if (data.action === 'sync_all') {
      syncSheet(ss, SHEET_NAME_RECEIVE, data.receives,
        ['ID','Date','Group','Category','Item','Challan','Supplier','Qty']);
      syncSheet(ss, SHEET_NAME_ISSUE, data.issues,
        ['ID','Date','Slip','Group','Category','Item','Qty','Machine/Dept','Machine No','Remarks']);
      syncStockSheet(ss, data.items, data.receives, data.issues);
      // Drive ও update
      PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().setProperty('igl_backup', raw);
      saveToDrive(raw);
      return ok('All synced + Drive updated');
    }
    if (data.action === 'sync_receives') {
      syncSheet(ss, SHEET_NAME_RECEIVE, data.receives,
        ['ID','Date','Group','Category','Item','Challan','Supplier','Qty']);
      return ok('Receives synced');
    }
    if (data.action === 'sync_issues') {
      syncSheet(ss, SHEET_NAME_ISSUE, data.issues,
        ['ID','Date','Slip','Group','Category','Item','Qty','Machine/Dept','Machine No','Remarks']);
      return ok('Issues synced');
    }
    if (data.action === 'sync_stock') {
      syncStockSheet(ss, data.items, data.receives, data.issues);
      return ok('Stock synced');
    }
    if (data.action === 'append_receive') {
      appendRow(ss, SHEET_NAME_RECEIVE,
        ['ID','Date','Group','Category','Item','Challan','Supplier','Qty'],
        [data.row.id, data.row.date, data.row.group, data.row.category,
         data.row.item, data.row.chalan||'', data.row.supplier||'', data.row.qty]);
      return ok('Receive appended');
    }
    if (data.action === 'append_issue') {
      appendRow(ss, SHEET_NAME_ISSUE,
        ['ID','Date','Slip','Group','Category','Item','Qty','Machine/Dept','Machine No','Remarks'],
        [data.row.id, data.row.date, data.row.slip||'', data.row.group, data.row.category,
         data.row.item, data.row.qty, data.row.machineId||'', data.row.machineNo||'', data.row.remarks||'']);
      return ok('Issue appended');
    }
    return ok('Unknown action');
  } catch(err) {
    return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({status:'error',message:err.toString()}))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
  }
}

function doGet(e) {
  if (e && e.parameter && e.parameter.action === 'load') {
    var raw = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('igl_backup');
    if (!raw) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({status:'empty'})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    try {
      var data = JSON.parse(raw);
      return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({status:'ok', data:data})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    } catch(err) {
      return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({status:'error',message:err.toString()})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }
  }
  return ok('IGL ERP Sheets connected!');
}

function syncSheet(ss, name, rows, headers) {
  var sh = ss.getSheetByName(name) || ss.insertSheet(name);
  sh.clearContents();
  sh.appendRow(headers);
  rows.forEach(function(r) {
    if (name === 'Receive')
      sh.appendRow([r.id,r.date,r.group||'',r.category||'',r.item,r.chalan||'',r.supplier||'',r.qty]);
    else
      sh.appendRow([r.id,r.date,r.slip||'',r.group||'',r.category||'',r.item,r.qty,r.machineId||'',r.machineNo||'',r.remarks||'']);
  });
  formatHeader(sh);
}

function syncStockSheet(ss, items, receives, issues) {
  var sh = ss.getSheetByName(SHEET_NAME_STOCK) || ss.insertSheet(SHEET_NAME_STOCK);
  sh.clearContents();
  sh.appendRow(['Item','Group','Category','Total Receive','Total Issue','Current Stock','Status']);
  items.forEach(function(it) {
    var rec = receives.filter(function(r){return r.item===it.name;}).reduce(function(s,r){return s+r.qty;},0);
    var iss = issues.filter(function(r){return r.item===it.name;}).reduce(function(s,r){return s+r.qty;},0);
    var stk = rec - iss;
    sh.appendRow([it.name, it.group||'', it.category||'', rec, iss, stk, stk<=0?'STOCK OUT':stk<=10?'LOW':'OK']);
  });
  formatHeader(sh);
}

function appendRow(ss, name, headers, rowData) {
  var sh = ss.getSheetByName(name);
  if (!sh) { sh = ss.insertSheet(name); sh.appendRow(headers); formatHeader(sh); }
  sh.appendRow(rowData);
}

function formatHeader(sh) {
  var hRow = sh.getRange(1, 1, 1, sh.getLastColumn());
  hRow.setBackground('#1a5276').setFontColor('#ffffff').setFontWeight('bold');
}

function ok(msg) {
  return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({status:'ok',message:msg}))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}

Bulk Item Import (Excel / CSV)

Type or paste items below - one item per line in this format: Group Name, Item Name
Example:
Bearing, Bearing-608
Bearing, Bearing-627
Bearing, Bearing-6000
Needle, ND-11
Needle, ND-14

Bulk Machine Import (Excel / CSV)

Copy from Excel and paste below - one machine per line: Machine Number, Machine ID (Category optional)
Select 2 columns in Excel, copy, then paste here.
Example:
SJ-001, M-01
SJ-002, M-02
RI-001, M-03
JQ-001, M-04
